---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement for AccessVision.
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., "I find it hard to press the capture button when using my phone one-handed...")

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain how the frontend user experience and/or backend ML orchestration will change.

## Accessibility Impact
How does this feature align with accessibility guidelines (WCAG 2.1 AA/AAA) or benefit visually impaired users? (e.g., provides a voice-activated trigger, introduces haptic feedback).

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or diagram concepts here.
